title: Slash commandy /mini:undo a /mini:model
goal: Add non-interactive native slash commands /mini:undo and /mini:model. For undo, add a non-interactive CLI path (--dry-run to preview the change, --yes to skip the confirmation prompt) so the slash command can show a preview, confirm in the chat and apply without a TTY prompt; for model, rely on the existing non-interactive subcommands (show / <scope> <id> / reset). Register both in COMMAND_DEFS and the install hint, update README/CHANGELOG, add tests.

steps.title: undo --dry-run a --yes flagy
steps.detail: Refactor undo() to accept options {dryRun, yes}: --dry-run prints the change summary and exits without prompting or applying; --yes skips the confirm and applies directly; wire both flags in cli.ts. Covered by undo.test.ts.

steps.title: /mini:undo slash command
steps.detail: Add an 'undo' CommandDef with a custom non-interactive body: run mini undo --dry-run, relay the preview, confirm in the chat (destructive, only one step back), then mini undo --yes.

steps.title: /mini:model slash command
steps.detail: Add a 'model' CommandDef with argumentHint and a custom body that uses only the non-interactive subcommands (mini model show / <scope> <id> / reset) and never the interactive pickers; gather a missing scope/model in the chat.

steps.title: Update install hint and command tests
steps.detail: Add undo and model to the install hint list in install-commands.ts; update install-commands.test.ts expected file list and add body assertions for undo/model.

steps.title: README and CHANGELOG
steps.detail: Document the new /mini:undo and /mini:model slash commands and the new undo --dry-run/--yes flags.

resolvedVerify: Run /mini:undo and /mini:model in a real Claude Code session
